unit_of_work: GitHub-style repo layout + functional sort (apps/jamstack), branch feat/jamstack-repo-layout
rationale: All four independent lenses returned pass; no error-severity findings and no fail verdicts, so the aggregation rule yields a pass. Work proceeds to verify.

findings.message: All acceptance criteria met and correctly understood: default sort 'Last pushed', invalid/absent ?sort= falls back via parseSort, pagination preserves sort, error panel preserved, no search bar / no 'All' heading / data-backed meta only, fetchOrgRepoCount degrades to null without breaking the listing.

Tests assert requirements not implementation across sort mapping, pagination (incl. partial-last/empty page), relativeTime buckets, abbreviateCount rounding, repo field mapping (null license / missing topics), and row rendering; 96/96 unit tests pass clean.
relativeTime tests stop at weeks; year/month buckets untested. Uniform loop logic, so a coverage gap not a defect.
abbreviateCount has no millions tier, but counts in this UI never reach that scale; within scope.
?sort= whitelisted via parseSort (falls back to default); buildReposUrl only emits typed literal sort/direction. ?page= normalized. No injection surface.
No dangerouslySetInnerHTML; all repo text auto-escaped by React. Same-tab external links, so no reverse-tabnabbing surface.
Repos + org count fetched in parallel with next:{revalidate:60}; the extra GET /orgs/github is best-effort (try/catch -> null) and never breaks the listing.
A11y: valid heading order (h1 then h2/row), labelled native select, aria-hidden Octicons, SR-only metadata nouns, one overlay link per row; e2e axe-clean (0 violations) and Biome a11y lints pass.
Contrast passes WCAG AA for all pairs (link 5.19, pills 6.16, gray text 7.56), incl. over hover:bg-gray-50.
SEO: static metadata, lang=en, semantic headings, server-rendered.

Repo.updatedAt is mapped/typed but never read by any render path (only pushedAt drives 'Updated …'); appears solely as fixture data. Harmless carried-but-unused field; the type comment is slightly inaccurate.
No deps added: package.json unchanged, Octicons inlined with MIT provenance; knip clean; typecheck passes under strict TS.
Strong separation: pure unit-tested helpers keep components thin; SortControl the only leaf client component while page stays a Server Component; strict-TS edge cases handled deliberately.
Run instructions correct (pnpm install; pnpm --filter jamstack dev); no package.json/lockfile changes so no hidden setup steps.
Docs describe the new layout accurately (GitHub model, Primer Octicons, Linguist colours, scope notes: no search, issues conflates PRs, graph omitted); no stale Previous/Next-only claims.
Documented ?sort= values match SORT_OPTIONS; org count attributed to public_repos; documented structure matches added files.
Tests table matches actual test files present.
3 commits cleanly scoped one-concern-each with clear messages; no stray dependencies.
Minor naming variance (not misleading): provenance doc says 'sort-desc' Octicon while README says 'sort'; same glyph (SortIcon).
